_meta.description: REST 409 conflict envelope (rest-api.md §7.8, MYR-174). Emitted when a ride-request lifecycle mutation is illegal from the row's current state (e.g. accepting a cancelled ride, cancelling a completed one — §7.8 transition matrix). REST-only: never emitted over the WS. Consumers surface it and MUST NOT auto-retry the same mutation.

error.message: ride request is not in a state that permits this transition
